Candr giving a Drishti to, or occupying the 9 from Karakāńś and joining in

th
association with a female not of his own. If Guru is alone, related to the 9
from Karakāńś by Drishti, or by Yuti, the native will be addicted to females
and be devoted to sensual enjoyments.

57-60. Effects of the 10 from Karakāńś. If the 10 from Karakāńś receives
a Drishti from, or is conjoined by a benefic, the native will have firm riches,
th
